text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early one morning, Air Groove is waiting outside
the academy gate.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Air Groove! You're quite the early bird
today!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I woke up feeling quite refreshed, so I
thought it would be nice to say good morning to
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'll join you! I'm on the disciplinary
committee, after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh, it'd be a pleasure to have you here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and Bamboo Memory's lively
greetings echo across the academy.
